description.unified: Summons 5 homing arrow that tracks enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal additional Physical DMG to the enemy.

Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line and knocks them down. This skill applies an additional [(added) 800 -> (removed) 500] Physical Defense Penetration, and damage increases based on [remaining->lost] HP, and against Bosses, deals additional Physical DMG.

After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK by 24*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Critical Hit Chance by 80 for 7sec. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows, each dealing [95.3%->143%] ATK Physical DMG.

On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by {0}% for 10 sec, and during the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical Damage to the target. The additional damage can only occur once every 0.5 sec.
